personal.name: Hiruvinda Jayashanka
personal.tagline: I build beautiful, fast, and accessible digital experiences. Turning ideas into polished products.

paragraphs: Hey! I'm a passionate developer who loves crafting elegant solutions to complex problems. I specialise in building modern web applications with a focus on performance, accessibility, and clean code.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new tech, contributing to open source, or experimenting with design. I believe great software is a mix of technical craft and creative thinking.

projects.title: CollabFlow
projects.description: A real-time collaborative workspace that lets distributed teams plan, write, and ship together — think Notion meets Linear with live cursors.
projects.myRole: Led the full frontend architecture, designed the real-time sync engine using WebSockets, and built the rich-text editor from scratch. Also handled deployment pipeline on AWS.
projects.impact: Reduced context-switching for teams by 40%. Became the primary tool for 3 client companies within the first month of launch, handling 500+ concurrent users.

projects.title: DataLens AI
projects.description: An AI-powered analytics dashboard that transforms raw CSV data into interactive visualisations and natural-language insights instantly.
projects.myRole: Built the entire data ingestion pipeline, designed the D3.js chart components, and integrated the OpenAI API for the natural-language query feature.
projects.impact: Cut reporting time from hours to seconds for non-technical users. Won 1st place at the university hackathon among 60 competing teams.

projects.title: ShopWave
projects.description: A mobile-first e-commerce platform with a seamless checkout experience, real-time inventory management, and a merchant dashboard.
projects.myRole: Owned the entire checkout flow including Stripe integration, built the merchant dashboard, and optimised database queries that cut load times by 60%.
projects.impact: Processed over LKR 2M in transactions during a 3-month pilot. Merchant onboarding time dropped from 2 days to under 20 minutes.

projects.title: MediTrack
projects.description: A hospital management system for tracking patient records, appointments, and medication schedules across multiple departments.
projects.myRole: Designed the database schema, built the REST API, and developed the appointment scheduling module with conflict detection and SMS reminders.
projects.impact: Deployed at a regional clinic in Colombo, reducing appointment scheduling errors by 85% and cutting administrative overhead by half.

projects.title: DevPulse
projects.description: A developer productivity tracker that aggregates GitHub activity, commit streaks, and coding patterns into a personal performance dashboard.
projects.myRole: Built the GitHub OAuth integration, designed the streak and stat calculation algorithms, and created the animated dashboard UI with real-time updates.
projects.impact: Used by 200+ developers within 2 weeks of launch. Featured in a Sri Lankan tech newsletter, driving organic growth with zero marketing spend.
